channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Surging IPO activity is one of the four horsemen of a market bubble, according to this portfolio manager

item.title: ‘It would feel like a burden’: My stepmother, 96, owns the house I grew up in. Is it wrong to tell her I don’t want to inherit it?
item.description: <![CDATA[‘It would feel like a burden’: My stepmother, 96, owns the house I grew up in. Is it wrong to tell her I don’t want to inherit it?]]>

item.title: The late James Van Der Beek’s former Beverly Hills home up for rent for $13,950 a month
item.description: <![CDATA[The late James Van Der Beek’s former Beverly Hills home up for rent for $13,950 a month]]>

item.title: Texas Instruments shares are sliding, and its rival is doing even worse. What’s going on in the world of analog semiconductors.
